variables.notes: Using revenue priority list: prefer Net Sales, with Total Revenue as fallback since both represent the same top-line concept.

variables.notes: No explicit standalone SG&A total row is present. Selected the main operating overhead buckets. Did not add R&D separately because the detailed breakdown indicates R & D Expenses is embedded within Other operating expenses in earlier years, so adding it would risk double counting.

candidates.why: R&D-related label exists, but it appears as a supplemental/below-EBIT-style disclosure and is less preferable than the explicit above-EBIT operating expense line.

variables.notes: Candidate list misses the more appropriate dedicated R&D expense row. variables.notes: Using a priority list: explicit interest expense first, then broader finance-expense labels as fallback. Excluded lease-interest-only rows because they are partial rather than total interest expense.
